scripts.prebuild:win: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path 'dist-electron-out') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'dist-electron-out' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Continue }; Get-ChildItem -Path . -File -Filter 'rongjiahe-erp-*-setup.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction Continue; Get-ChildItem -Path . -File -Filter '*.blockmap' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction Continue; if (Test-Path 'latest.yml') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'latest.yml' -Force -ErrorAction Continue }"
scripts.build:win: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY='false'; $env:ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR='https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/'; $env:USE_HARD_LINKS='false'; $env:VITE_API_BASE_URL=''; $env:VITE_ELECTRON_USE_LOCAL_BACKEND='true'; $env:ELECTRON_OPEN_DEVTOOLS='true'; $env:TARGET_PLATFORM='win32'; $env:TARGET_ARCH='x64'; $env:npm_config_platform='win32'; $env:npm_config_arch='x64'; $ts=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'; $out='dist-electron-win-'+$ts; npm run prebuild:win; npm run preelectron:build; npm run build; npx --no-install electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never --config.directories.output=$out"
scripts.build:win:debug: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY='false'; $env:ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR='https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/'; $env:USE_HARD_LINKS='false'; $env:DEBUG='electron-builder,electron-builder:*'; $env:ELECTRON_BUILDER_LOG_LEVEL='debug'; $env:TARGET_PLATFORM='win32'; $env:TARGET_ARCH='x64'; $env:npm_config_platform='win32'; $env:npm_config_arch='x64'; $ts=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'; $out='dist-electron-win-'+$ts; $log='dist-electron-win-'+$ts+'.log'; npm run prebuild:win; npm run preelectron:build; npm run build; npx --no-install electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never --config.directories.output=$out *>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath $log"
